fun Domain => fun Codomain => fun domainMeasurable => fun codomainMeasurable =>
fun Value => fun zero => fun add => fun subtract => fun countableSum => fun leq =>
fun valueEq => fun FiniteValue => fun domainMeasure => fun pushforwardMeasure => fun map =>
forall (P : Prop), forall (mk :
forall (domain_measure_space_law : @MeasureSpace.{i,u,m} Domain domainMeasurable Value zero add subtract countableSum leq valueEq FiniteValue domainMeasure),
forall (codomain_measurable_space_law : @MeasurableSpace.{i,v} Codomain codomainMeasurable),
forall (measurable_map_law : @MeasurableFunction.{i,u,v} Domain Codomain domainMeasurable codomainMeasurable map),
forall (pushforward_formula_law : forall (codomainSet : forall (y : Codomain), Prop), forall (codomain_set_measurable : codomainMeasurable codomainSet), valueEq (pushforwardMeasure codomainSet) (domainMeasure (@MapPreimage.{u,v} Domain Codomain map codomainSet))),
forall (pushforward_integration_formula_law : Prop),
forall (distribution_measure_specialization_law : Prop),
forall (no_separate_probability_measure_api_law : Prop), P), P

fun Domain => fun Codomain => fun domainMeasurable => fun codomainMeasurable =>
fun Value => fun zero => fun add => fun subtract => fun countableSum => fun leq =>
fun valueEq => fun FiniteValue => fun domainMeasure => fun pushforwardMeasure => fun map =>
fun pushforward =>
pushforward (@MeasurableFunction.{i,u,v} Domain Codomain domainMeasurable codomainMeasurable map)
(fun (domain_measure_space_law : @MeasureSpace.{i,u,m} Domain domainMeasurable Value zero add subtract countableSum leq valueEq FiniteValue domainMeasure) =>
fun (codomain_measurable_space_law : @MeasurableSpace.{i,v} Codomain codomainMeasurable) =>
fun (measurable_map_law : @MeasurableFunction.{i,u,v} Domain Codomain domainMeasurable codomainMeasurable map) =>
fun (pushforward_formula_law : forall (codomainSet : forall (y : Codomain), Prop), forall (codomain_set_measurable : codomainMeasurable codomainSet), valueEq (pushforwardMeasure codomainSet) (domainMeasure (@MapPreimage.{u,v} Domain Codomain map codomainSet))) =>
fun (pushforward_integration_formula_law : Prop) =>
fun (distribution_measure_specialization_law : Prop) =>
fun (no_separate_probability_measure_api_law : Prop) => measurable_map_law)

fun Domain => fun Codomain => fun domainMeasurable => fun codomainMeasurable =>
fun Value => fun zero => fun add => fun subtract => fun countableSum => fun leq =>

(fun (domain_measure_space_law : @MeasureSpace.{i,u,m} Domain domainMeasurable Value zero add subtract countableSum leq valueEq FiniteValue domainMeasure) =>

fun Domain => fun Codomain => fun domainMeasurable => fun codomainMeasurable =>
fun Value => fun zero => fun add => fun subtract => fun countableSum => fun leq =>
fun valueEq => fun FiniteValue => fun domainMeasure => fun pushforwardMeasure => fun map =>
fun pushforward => fun PushforwardConclusion => fun route =>
pushforward PushforwardConclusion
(fun (domain_measure_space_law : @MeasureSpace.{i,u,m} Domain domainMeasurable Value zero add subtract countableSum leq valueEq FiniteValue domainMeasure) =>
fun (codomain_measurable_space_law : @MeasurableSpace.{i,v} Codomain codomainMeasurable) =>

fun (distribution_measure_specialization_law : Prop) =>
